product_updates.title: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw’s creator from accessing Claude
product_updates.content: This ban took place after Claude's pricing changed for OpenClaw users last week.

product_updates.title: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
product_updates.content: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass-casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.

product_updates.title: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
product_updates.content: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains reshaping society: AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment. product_updates.title: Last 24 hours: Save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
product_updates.content: This is it. Tonight is your last chance to lock in savings of up to $500 for your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass. These discounts end at 11:59 p.m. PT.

technical_breakthroughs.title: What’s in a name? Moderna’s “vaccine” vs. “therapy” dilemma
technical_breakthroughs.content: Is it the Department of Defense or the Department of War? The Gulf of Mexico or the Gulf of America? A vaccine—or an “individualized neoantigen treatment”? That’s the Trump-era vocabulary paradox facing Moderna, the covid-19 shot maker whose plans for next-generation mRNA vaccines against flus an…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Constellations
technical_breakthroughs.content: I. We had crash-landed on the planet. We were far from home. The spaceship could not be repaired, and the rescue beacon had failed. Besides me, only the astrogator, part of the captain, and the ship’s AI mind were left. Outside, the atmosphere registered as hostile to most organisms. We huddled i…
